allow: Bash(conda run -n saegenrec python -c "import torch; print\(''torch:'', torch.__version__\); print\(''CUDA available:'', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\(''CUDA version:'', torch.version.cuda\)")
Bash(conda run -n saegenrec conda search -c https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/anaconda/cloud/conda-forge/ faiss-gpu)
Bash(conda run -n saegenrec python -c "import faiss; print\(''faiss version:'', faiss.__version__\); print\(''GPU res:'', faiss.StandardGpuResources\(\)\)")
